item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach тАУ Why Every Christian Needs to Understand Bitcoin (Biblical Stewardship & The Ethics of Money) | Jordan Bush & Ahshuwah Hawthorne of Thank God For Bitcoin Media
item.description:
тАЛтАЛAre central banks stealing your soul? In this show we explore why fiat debasement is a moral crisis and why Biblical stewardship now requires Bitcoin. We dive deep into the ethics of money production, the "hidden theology" of the Bitcoin blockchain, and why the global Church is ditching the dollar to reclaim financial sovereignty.┬а

The modern church often ignores the financial rot that weakens its influence. Most organizations function within a reactive cycle. Effective Christian leaders now recognize that ignoring the collapsing financial landscape constitutes negligence. We explore the intersection of faith and finance to understand why so many NGOs admit that their global mission suffers under current funding systems. We analyze the inevitable consequences of currency debasement and discuss why apathy is no longer an option for responsible leaders.

Jordan Bush (@jmbushwrites) and Ahshuwah Hawthorne (@iAhsh) demonstrate how engineering rigor changes how ministry funds move across borders. They explain the function of their innovation lab where Bitcoin developers and ministry heads collaborate on building new solutions. They equip those on the front lines with the tools necessary to survive when the centralized banking system denies them access.

We have accepted managed decline as the natural order of things. We discuss why Bitcoin functions as sound money that restores a moral framework to our economy. This conversation serves as a necessary check for anyone who wants to understand how incentives dictate human behavior and societal outcomes.

Growing organizations often abandon the for-profit model as momentum builds. Restructuring as a non-profit arm of Brilliance Labs allows these groups to shift their focus from quarterly returns to long-term global impact. This move creates a foundation that enables ministries to hold value and sustain operations without fear of censorship or institutional overreach.

The religious establishment frequently dismisses Bitcoin despite its role as a vital asset for our time. These digital assets create a bridge for people to re-examine their values, low time preference, and legacy. This episode serves as a guide for those who believe the traditional financial world requires correction. Join us as we explore the future of stewardship.

тАФBitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about Thank God for Bitcoin:
Jordan Bush X: https://x.com/jordanbush
Ahshuwah Hawthorne X: https://x.com/iAhsh
TGFB X:┬а https://x.com/ThankGodforBTC
Brilliance Labs Web: https://brilliancelabs.org/
Web: https://tgfb.com/
IG: https://www.instagram.com/thankgodforbitcoin/
YT: ┬а@thankgodforbitcoin
┬а ┬а ┬а ┬а ┬а
Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 тАФ Intro
01:59 тАФ Thank God For Bitcoin is essential for fighting fiat values.
13:29 тАФ Missionaries are the perfect leverage for Bitcoin adoption.
16:09 тАФ El Salvador proved the power of local Bitcoin economies.
25:41 тАФ We transitioned our Bitcoin project to a non-profit model.
33:00 тАФ Curated design labs destroy generic Bitcoin conferences.
35:59 тАФ We used Bitcoin design labs to orange-pill an Archbishop.
43:13 тАФ The Bitcoin rabbit hole forces a return to objective faith.
51:43 тАФ Bitcoin protocol incentives naturally enforce objective truth.
56:13 тАФ Christian NGOs are securing treasuries with Bitcoin adoption.

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

01:59 тАФ Thank God For Bitcoin is essential for fighting fiat values.
13:29 тАФ Missionaries are the perfect leverage for Bitcoin adoption.
16:09 тАФ El Salvador proved the power of local Bitcoin economies.
25:41 тАФ We transitioned our Bitcoin project to a non-profit model.
33:00 тАФ Curated design labs destroy generic Bitcoin conferences.
35:59 тАФ We used Bitcoin design labs to orange-pill an Archbishop.
43:13 тАФ The Bitcoin rabbit hole forces a return to objective faith.
51:43 тАФ Bitcoin protocol incentives naturally enforce objective truth.
56:13 тАФ Christian NGOs are securing treasuries with Bitcoin adoption.

Live From Bitcoin Beach

item.title: All In Bitcoin тАУ 030 Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War I All In Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
ЁЯОЩя╕П Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War.

Privacy is breaking. Bitcoin is under pressure. And most people donтАЩt see it coming.

In this episode with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into the reality behind digital privacy, online attacks, and the growing tensions inside Bitcoin.

Jameson explains the real reasons behind his swatting, how misinformation and bots are reshaping online narratives, and why protecting privacy is becoming harder than ever. We also unpack the Knots vs Core debate and what it reveals about BitcoinтАЩs future.

This is a conversation about power, control, and responsibility in Bitcoin and beyond.

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll тАУ From Crypto Access to Institutional Operating System
item.description:
Thomas Langbein, Chief Commercial Officer at Trever, shares his journey from traditional banking and strategy consulting into the world of digital assets, where he recognised early on that blockchain technology could fundamentally reshape capital markets. Drawing on his experience across institutions like Commerzbank, EY, and Accenture, he explains how his exposure to digital transformation and early crypto developments led him to join Trever. Today, he operates at the intersection of traditional finance and emerging infrastructure, helping institutions navigate the complexities of integrating digital assets into their core business. This background sets the stage for a conversation that is less about hypeтАФand more about real-world execution.

At the heart of the discussion is a key insight: the real challenge for financial institutions is no longer access to digital assets, but their operationalisation. Thomas outlines the hidden complexity behind seemingly simple use cases like crypto trading, highlighting the fragmented ecosystem of trading venues, custody providers, compliance tools, and settlement processes. Trever positions itself as a тАЬdigital asset operating systemтАЭ that orchestrates these components into a unified infrastructure layer, enabling banks and brokers to manage trading, treasury, settlement, and bookkeeping in a compliant and scalable way. This becomes particularly relevant as institutions move beyond isolated pilots and begin building long-term capabilities across multiple asset classes. Looking ahead, the conversation explores how institutional strategies are evolving from a narrow focus on crypto towards a broader view that includes stablecoins, digital payments, and tokenised securities.

Thomas emphasises that the real benefits of blockchain-based finance will only materialise when both the asset and payment sides move on-chain, enabling more efficient settlement models. As banks gradually integrate these capabilities, the distinction between traditional and digital assets is expected to fade, leading to a unified financial infrastructure. The episode closes with a clear call to action: financial institutions that want to stay competitive should start building their operational foundations nowтАФbefore digital assets become a core part of mainstream banking.

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockтАЩnтАЩRoll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockтАЩnтАЩRoll Telegram Channel

Always remember: Do your own researchтАФinform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast тАУ Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible тАУ Chat_166 - The Great Distraction: Epstein vs. Quantum in Bitcoin with Rob Wallace on Bitcoin News
item.description:
"The whole point of libertarianism is that we should recognise that we don't know how to plan the world. We don't know what the solution is going to be. You can't have a central planner decide it.If it was really just that libertarians understood how the world worked, then you could have a central planner. You would just need them to be libertarians. That's not how it works at all.┬аIt's antithetical to the whole concept.

That's why the Block Size War was such a huge success, because it did not hard-fork. It did not decide: 'Oh, if there is a schism in the community, one small group is going to be able to force it onto everybody else.'
And that's exactly the thing that you actually need to have society's rules be sustainable, because otherwise, that's all you get. You get people who will violently disagree about the tiniest shit, and then they will put a gun to everybody else's head, and they will say: 'You just got to come along with me or you're screwed.'"

~ Guy

Lately, it feels like an endless stream of noise tries to predict the death of Bitcoin. So I joined Rob Wallace on the Bitcoin News channel to cut through the panic and tackle the two loudest distractions: Google's latest quantum computing claims and the wild conspiracy that Jeffrey Epstein dictated Bitcoin's code.

We look at the actual physics of quantum processing to see if scaling qubits without catastrophic environmental noise is even possible. But the Epstein drama is what really gets me fired up. People are rewriting the history of the block size wars to fit a comfortable narrative. We lay out why he had zero practical influence over Bitcoin, and why some folks would rather believe an elaborate lie than accept the reality of decentralized consensus.

But we do not just stay in the weeds. I also share why I am incredibly optimistic about non-custodial scaling solutions like Ark, and how vibe coding is sparking a peer-to-peer renaissance. Big thanks to Rob and the Bitcoin News channel for hosting me!

Chapters

(00:00:00) - The failure of central planning and libertarian ideals

(00:01:41) - Assessing the actual quantum threat to Bitcoin

(00:08:44) - Why quantum experiments lack genuine cryptographic proof

(00:20:06) - Prioritizing quantum resistance among protocol developers

(00:22:50) - Debunking the Epstein and MIT Media Lab narrative

(00:31:06) - The reality of the early Blockstream investments

(00:39:41) - Why the liberty movement split over Bitcoin scaling

(00:44:12) - Hard truths about network architecture and TCP/IP

(00:52:29) - Can Bitcoin truly separate money from the state

(00:55:08) - The friction of living entirely on a Bitcoin standard

(01:00:12) - Vibe coding and a new peer-to-peer renaissance

Guest Links

  • Rob on X (Link: https://twitter.com/_Rob_Wallace)
  • Bitcoin News on X (Link: https://twitter.com/bitcoinnewscom)
  • Bitcoin News Website (Link: https://bitcoinnews.com/)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get тБа10% off the COLDCARDтБа with code BITCOINAUDIBLE тБатБатБатБатБатБа(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)
  • (Under construction) Check out the list of products and services I use and recommend on BitcoinAudible.com (Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/)

Host Links

  • тБаGuy on Nostr тБа(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • тБаGuy on X тБа(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • тБаBitcoin Audible on XтБа (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)
]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin тАУ To The Unknown Pod Episode 42: Bitcoin and A World At War
item.description:
In this episode, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay explore the complex intersections of global conflict, economic warfare, and Bitcoin's role as a resilient alternative in a world at war. They analyze recent Middle East tensions, the decline of the petrodollar, and how Bitcoin offers a form of financial sovereignty amidst geopolitical chaos.

]]>

Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in f├╝hrenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir ├╝ber die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die m├╢gliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- L├╢sungen f├╝r eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik ├╝berhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einf├╝hrt

- Bitcoin St├дdte Spiel: Errate die f├╝nf beliebtesten Bitcoin St├дdte weltweit

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal тАУ 2320: $10M Bitcoin Now - Global Supply Is Locked In
item.description:
BlackRock and Michael Saylor are now competing for the same Bitcoin supply, and that supply is disappearing in real time. Over 1.6 million BTC is already controlled by just two entities, while long-term holders and institutional buyers continue removing coins from circulation.

This is not a typical market cycle driven by demand. It's a structural supply shock. As available Bitcoin vanishes, liquidity tightens and price discovery accelerates. When there are no sellers left, the market doesn't grind higher - it reprices.

For the full premium livestream experience with video, visit our Rumble at http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael and guests Sophi and Adam discuss whether Satoshi himself is about to be rug pulled. There's a new proposal on the table from Bitcoin developers that want to freeze quantum vulnerable wallets - including Satoshi's entire stack of over 1 million coins.

They also talk about the EU's Christine Lagarde warning of food rationing, scammers demanding USDT to enter the Strait of Hormuz, hundreds of millions lost in crypto hacks and our Donkey of the Week, Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin!

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael and guests Sophi and Adam discuss whether Satoshi himself is about to be rug pulled. There's a new proposal on the table from Bitcoin developers that want to freeze quantum vulnerable wallets - including Satoshi's entire stack of over 1 million coins.

They also talk about the EU's Christine Lagarde warning of food rationing, scammers demanding USDT to enter the Strait of Hormuz, hundreds of millions lost in crypto hacks and our Donkey of the Week, Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin!

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts тАУ Invest #207 | Melt-Up statt Crash? Warum Bitcoin jetzt steigen k├╢nnte
item.description:
Rallye statt Crash?

Bitcoin k├дmpft sich zur├╝ck in Richtung 80.000 US-Dollar тАУ doch unter der Oberfl├дche passiert gerade deutlich mehr. W├дhrend das Sentiment im Krypto-Markt weiterhin schwach bleibt, verdichten sich im Makro-Bereich die Signale f├╝r ein m├╢gliches Szenario, das viele aktuell komplett untersch├дtzen: einen sogenannten Melt-Up.

In dieser Folge analysieren Johannes & BTC-ECHO Chefredakteur Sven Wagenknecht, warum genau dieses bullische Setup entstehen k├╢nnte тАУ trotz geopolitischer Risiken, Inflationssorgen und schwachem Krypto-Narrativ.

Im Fokus stehen: тАУ Warum fallende Realzinsen ein Gamechanger f├╝r Bitcoin sein k├╢nnten тАУ Welche Rolle die Fed-Bilanz und globale Liquidit├дt spielen тАУ Warum KI, Gold und Aktien aktuell Kapital binden тАУ und was das f├╝r BTC bedeutet тАУ Weshalb institutionelle Nachfrage gerade ein untersch├дtzter Treiber ist тАУ Und welches Risiko viele Anleger aktuell komplett ignorieren

Au├Яerdem im Altcoin-Check: Litecoin unter Druck nach Sicherheitsvorfall тАУ und die wachsende Gefahr durch KI-gest├╝tzte Exploits im gesamten Krypto-Sektor.

]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse тАУ Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12тАУ24 months.

]]>

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast тАУ Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 тАУ Ein Gespr├дch ├╝ber Banken IT und Bitcoin B├╝cher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstst├дndig in der Beratung f├╝r Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er fr├╝h den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespr├дch erz├дhlt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman ├╝ber Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erf├дhrst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zun├дchst wieder verkaufte und sp├дter mit v├╢llig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstst├дndigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begr├╝├Яung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Ver├дnderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstst├дndigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman ├╝ber Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps f├╝r Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends тАУ #55 Bitcoinpreis schwach, Fundamentaldaten intakt: Dominik Weibel ├╝ber Bitcoins Lage 2026
item.description:
Im Februar 2026 wurde Bitcoin so oft f├╝r tot erkl├дrt wie noch nie in einem Monat. Gleichzeitig kaufen institutionelle Investoren, steigt die Hashrate, und die Daten auf der Blockchain zeigen ein v├╢llig anderes Bild. Was stimmt hier nicht zusammen?

Heute zu Gast: Dominik Weibel, Head of Research bei Bitcoin Suisse.

Was dich in dieser Episode erwartet:

  • Warum der Preis l├╝gt und die Fundamentaldaten nicht..
  • Die zweite institutionelle Welle steht bevor.
  • Great Wealth Transfer bis 2045: 90% der Krypto-Halter sind unter 40.
  • Wie man eine Anlage ohne Cashflows trotzdem seri├╢s einordnen kann.
  • Die grossen Risiken der n├дchsten Dekade

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin тАУ Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 11: Warum Dein Geld leise weniger wird
item.description:
Viele Menschen haben heute das Gef├╝hl: ЁЯСЙ Das Geld reicht nicht mehr so wie fr├╝her.

Diese Folge geht genau dieser Beobachtung nach тАУ mit klaren Zahlen und einfachen Beispielen aus dem Alltag.

Das erwartet dich: Warum dein Wocheneinkauf teurer geworden ist Wie stark die Kaufkraft seit 2000 gesunken ist Warum die Geldmenge im System st├дndig w├дchst Der einfache Zusammenhang zwischen Geldmenge und Preisen Warum das kein kurzfristiges Problem ist Bitcoin als m├╢gliches Gegenmodell Wichtige Gedanken aus der Folge:

ЁЯСЙ 100 тВм im Jahr 2000 haben heute nur noch etwa 55тАУ65 тВм Kaufkraft ЁЯСЙ Die Geldmenge im Euroraum hat sich in den letzten 20 Jahren mehr als verdreifacht ЁЯСЙ Mehr Geld im System f├╝hrt langfristig zu steigenden Preisen

Einordnung

Diese Folge ist keine Anlageberatung. Sie soll dir helfen, die Grundlagen unseres Geldsystems besser zu verstehen тАУ damit du fundierte eigene Entscheidungen treffen kannst.

]]>

Viele Menschen haben heute das Gef├╝hl: ЁЯСЙ Das Geld reicht nicht mehr so wie fr├╝her.

Diese Folge geht genau dieser Beobachtung nach тАУ mit klaren Zahlen und einfachen Beispielen aus dem Alltag.

Das erwartet dich: Warum dein Wocheneinkauf teurer geworden ist Wie stark die Kaufkraft seit 2000 gesunken ist Warum die Geldmenge im System st├дndig w├дchst Der einfache Zusammenhang zwischen Geldmenge und Preisen Warum das kein kurzfristiges Problem ist Bitcoin als m├╢gliches Gegenmodell Wichtige Gedanken aus der Folge:

ЁЯСЙ 100 тВм im Jahr 2000 haben heute nur noch etwa 55тАУ65 тВм Kaufkraft ЁЯСЙ Die Geldmenge im Euroraum hat sich in den letzten 20 Jahren mehr als verdreifacht ЁЯСЙ Mehr Geld im System f├╝hrt langfristig zu steigenden Preisen

Einordnung

Diese Folge ist keine Anlageberatung. Sie soll dir helfen, die Grundlagen unseres Geldsystems besser zu verstehen тАУ damit du fundierte eigene Entscheidungen treffen kannst.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update тАУ Could Bitcoin Freeze Old Wallets? The BIP 361 Debate Explained
item.description: <![CDATA[In this episode of The Weekly, Graham and Alex break down one of the biggest new debates in Bitcoin: should old wallets be frozen to protect the network from a future quantum threat?They unpack BIP 361, the case for and against freezing legacy addresses, what it could mean for SatoshiтАЩs coins, and why this debate goes far beyond technology. At the core is a much bigger question: if Bitcoin can change its rules to protect itself, does it stop being the immutable, neutral monetary asset people thought it was?The episode also covers:Bitcoin miner capitulationwhether mining centralization is a real long-term threatthe KelpDAO exploitwhy DeFi increasingly feels broken for everyday usersWatch for sharp analysis on Bitcoin, crypto markets, and the narratives shaping the space.00:41 - Welcome and Introductions01:24 - Paris Blockchain Week Insights02:43 - Market Overview and Bitcoin's Position04:51 - Discussion on BIP361 and Quantum Threat08:41 - Debate on Bitcoin's Rule Changes11:16 - Opposition to Quantum Resistance Proposals13:12 - Philosophical Debate on Bitcoin's Future17:38 - Bitcoin Miners and Market Challenges22:30 - KelpDAO Hack and DeFi Crisis30:32 - Conclusion and Upcoming Topics]]>

item.title: True Crime Bitcoin Podcast тАУ 5-Euro-Schraubenschl├╝ssel-Attacke Episode 4
item.description:
Neben all der Sicherheit, die Bitcoin durch Kryptografie, Dezentralit├дt und Proof-of-Work bietet, bleibt der Mensch der gr├╢├Яte Risikofaktor, sobald es zur Anwendung von Gewalt kommt. Kein Algorithmus der Welt kann gegen eine Waffe oder ein Messer sch├╝tzen тАУ zumindest nicht, wenn dadurch die Herausgabe eines Private Keys erzwungen werden soll.

Gemeinsam schauen wir uns an, wie dieses Szenario in den letzten Jahren zugenommen hat und welche spektakul├дren F├дlle sich in verschiedenen Teilen der Welt auf der Jagd nach Bitcoin-Haltern bereits zugetragen haben. Aber ist das wirklich ein Grund zur Panik? Wir versuchen, die Grenze zwischen berechtigter Vorsicht und unn├╢tiger Hysterie zu ziehen.

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast тАУ Saylor's STRC Buy Could've Been BILLIONS Bigger | Strategy Mega-Buy Roundtable
item.description:
Parker White from Apyx reveals on the record that Strategy could've raised 50тАУ100% more during its recent STRC mega-buy тАФ and chose not to.

On this Bitcoin Treasuries roundtable, Tyler Rowe sits down with Alexandre Laizet (Capital B), Ryan Lane (Empery Digital), Parker White (Apyx / DFDV), and Soleil (True North) to unpack the $2B+ STRC raise, debate whether smaller Bitcoin treasury companies should sell Bitcoin to buy back shares trading under NAV, and share their price targets for Bitcoin's next all-time high.

Topics covered:

  • Parker's insider account of Strategy's STRC capacity
  • Bi-monthly dividend rollouts and the race toward daily income
  • Ryan Lane on Empery Digital selling Bitcoin to grow BTC per share
  • Alexandre on why French institutions now understand digital credit
  • Managing MNAV multiples as a smaller treasury company
  • Bitcoin's stability during the Iran-Israel-US conflict
  • Capital B's target of 42,000 Bitcoin by 2029
  • Lightning round: when does Bitcoin hit a new all-time high?

Follow the panel:Alexandre Laizet: тБаhttps://twitter.com/@AlexandreLaizetтБаRyan Lane / Empery Digital: тБаhttps://twitter.com/@EMPD_BTCтБаParker White: тБаhttps://twitter.com/@TheOtherParkerтБа_Soleil: тБаhttps://twitter.com/@nithusezniтБа

Special thanks to @hemi_xyz тАФ тБаhttps://bit.ly/hemiXYZтБа

ЁЯФТ Secure your Bitcoin with COLDCARD тАФ use code 6BT for 6% off at bit.ly/coinkiteStore
ЁЯПж Borrow against your BTC from 8.49% at bit.ly/archlending
ЁЯПЫя╕П Institutional custody & OTC at bit.ly/bitGo
ЁЯТ╝ Bitcoin executive recruitment at bit.ly/XCEio

ЁЯУК Track every Bitcoin treasury company at bitcointreasuries.netЁЯТм Questions for the roundtable? тБаroundtable@bitcointreasuries.netтБа

тЪая╕П Not financial advice. Do your own research.ЁЯЯа Stay Orange.

CHAPTERS:

00:00 Cold Open

02:34 Welcome & Intros To The Panel

03:38 Apyx & The Implications Of STRC Dividends Going Semi-Monthly

07:22 Saylor Leaving Money On The Table w/ STRC ATM?

09:06 Institutional Interest in Bitcoin Treasuries

14:44 Empery Digital's Willingness to Sell BTC to Increase BPS

22:31 Varying Strategies to Accumulate More BTC Long-Term

26:09 Double-Edged Sword of Paying Dividends

39:54 The Rise of Retail Investment and Accessibility

43:37 Market Dynamics and Treasury Management

45:27 Live Reaction To BTC Price Pumping

46:16 Bitcoin's Response to Geopolitical Events

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber тАУ #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte ├╝ber ihre Eindr├╝cke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die allt├дgliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Pr├дsident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom t├дglichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielf├дltigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen T├дtigkeiten.

item.title: Surfin' Bitcoin тАУ Apr├иs l'annonce de Google, Bitcoin est-il en danger ? (CTO Ledger)
item.description:
Et si un ordinateur quantique pouvait demain casser BitcoinтАж et avec lui, banques, t├йl├йcommunications et d├йfense ?


Dans cet ├йpisode, on re├зoit Charles Guillemet, CTO de Ledger, pour d├йcrypter l'annonce fracassante de Google et comprendre ce que la menace quantique veut vraiment dire pour Bitcoin.


Au programme :

тЮд Ordinateur quantique, Shor et Grover : tout comprendre sans ├кtre ing├йnieur

тЮд L'annonce de Google : 500 000 cubits pour casser une cl├й en 9 minutes

тЮд Si le quantique tombait demain, Bitcoin n'est qu'un ├йpiph├йnom├иne face au chaos mondial

тЮд BIP 360 vs Starkware : les propositions pour rendre Bitcoin quantum-resistant

тЮд Hard fork, taille des blocs, UTXO de Satoshi : comment migrer Bitcoin

тЮд D├йtenteur de Bitcoin : que faire concr├иtement aujourd'hui ? (spoiler : rien)


ЁЯСЙ Formation "Investir en Bitcoin" тАФ int├йgrer Bitcoin dans votre gestion de patrimoine :

тЖТ https://www.investir-en-bitcoin.com/


00:00 тАУ Introduction : Charles Guillemet, CTO de Ledger, et la peur quantique sur Bitcoin

06:00 тАУ Ordinateur quantique : qu'est-ce que c'est et pourquoi ce n'est pas un ordi classique en mieux

10:03 тАУ Shor et Grover : les deux algorithmes quantiques qui menacent toute la cryptographie

14:25 тАУ L'annonce de Google : 9 minutes pour casser Bitcoin

21:01 тАУ Si l'ordinateur quantique existait en mai 2026 : mes Bitcoin sur Ledger sont-ils en danger ?

25:31 тАУ Au-del├а de Bitcoin : pourquoi le monde entier s'effondre si la cryptographie tombe

30:51 тАУ Cryptographie post-quantique : la solution existe, mais comment migrer Bitcoin ?

37:54 тАУ BIP 360 (Lightning Labs) et Starkware : les deux propositions techniques analys├йes

41:33 тАУ La vision de Charles Guillemet : signatures hash vs lattice, hard fork et UTXO de Satoshi

47:39 тАУ D├йtenteur de Bitcoin : que faut-il faire concr├иtement aujourd'hui ?

51:32 тАУ Ledger Nano S et post-quantique : que deviennent les anciens devices ?

56:57 тАУ Le mot de la fin : l'IA, nouveau front de la cybers├йcurit├й et le r├┤le du hardware


ЁЯСЙ Avec StackinSat, ├йpargnez en Bitcoin pour le long terme, sans stress ni effort :

тЖТ https://stackinsat.com/signup/1?r=SURFIN

H├йberg├й par Acast. Visitez acast.com/privacy pour plus d'informations.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible тАУ Chat_166 - The Great Distraction: Epstein vs. Quantum in Bitcoin with Rob Wallace on Bitcoin News
item.description:
"The whole point of libertarianism is that we should recognise that we don't know how to plan the world. We don't know what the solution is going to be. You can't have a central planner decide it.If it was really just that libertarians understood how the world worked, then you could have a central planner. You would just need them to be libertarians. That's not how it works at all.┬аIt's antithetical to the whole concept.

That's why the Block Size War was such a huge success, because it did not hard-fork. It did not decide: 'Oh, if there is a schism in the community, one small group is going to be able to force it onto everybody else.'
And that's exactly the thing that you actually need to have society's rules be sustainable, because otherwise, that's all you get. You get people who will violently disagree about the tiniest shit, and then they will put a gun to everybody else's head, and they will say: 'You just got to come along with me or you're screwed.'"

~ Guy

Lately, it feels like an endless stream of noise tries to predict the death of Bitcoin. So I joined Rob Wallace on the Bitcoin News channel to cut through the panic and tackle the two loudest distractions: Google's latest quantum computing claims and the wild conspiracy that Jeffrey Epstein dictated Bitcoin's code.

We look at the actual physics of quantum processing to see if scaling qubits without catastrophic environmental noise is even possible. But the Epstein drama is what really gets me fired up. People are rewriting the history of the block size wars to fit a comfortable narrative. We lay out why he had zero practical influence over Bitcoin, and why some folks would rather believe an elaborate lie than accept the reality of decentralized consensus.

But we do not just stay in the weeds. I also share why I am incredibly optimistic about non-custodial scaling solutions like Ark, and how vibe coding is sparking a peer-to-peer renaissance. Big thanks to Rob and the Bitcoin News channel for hosting me!

Chapters

(00:00:00) - The failure of central planning and libertarian ideals

(00:01:41) - Assessing the actual quantum threat to Bitcoin

(00:08:44) - Why quantum experiments lack genuine cryptographic proof

(00:20:06) - Prioritizing quantum resistance among protocol developers

(00:22:50) - Debunking the Epstein and MIT Media Lab narrative

(00:31:06) - The reality of the early Blockstream investments

(00:39:41) - Why the liberty movement split over Bitcoin scaling

(00:44:12) - Hard truths about network architecture and TCP/IP

(00:52:29) - Can Bitcoin truly separate money from the state

(00:55:08) - The friction of living entirely on a Bitcoin standard

(01:00:12) - Vibe coding and a new peer-to-peer renaissance

Guest Links

  • Rob on X (Link: https://twitter.com/_Rob_Wallace)
  • Bitcoin News on X (Link: https://twitter.com/bitcoinnewscom)
  • Bitcoin News Website (Link: https://bitcoinnews.com/)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get тБа10% off the COLDCARDтБа with code BITCOINAUDIBLE тБатБатБатБатБатБа(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)
  • (Under construction) Check out the list of products and services I use and recommend on BitcoinAudible.com (Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/)

Host Links

  • тБаGuy on Nostr тБа(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • тБаGuy on X тБа(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
